stress: Take 5 slow deep breaths and focus on your breathing.
Go for a short walk outside for 10 minutes.
Drink a glass of water and relax your body.
Write down what is stressing you in a notebook.
Listen to calm or relaxing music.
Stretch your body gently for a few minutes.
Close your eyes and focus on your breathing for 2 minutes.
Take a short break from work or studying.
Try organizing your tasks into smaller steps.
Do 10 jumping jacks to release tension.
Splash cold water on your face.
Look at photos of happy memories.
Chew gum slowly while focusing on the rhythm.
Hug a pillow or stuffed animal tightly.
sad: Write your feelings in a personal journal.
Talk to a trusted friend or family member.
Watch a comforting movie or show.
Spend some time doing a hobby you enjoy.
Take a short walk and get some fresh air.
Practice gratitude by listing three positive things today.
Take a few minutes to meditate quietly.
Remind yourself that difficult emotions can pass with time.
Pet an animal or watch cute animal videos.
Eat your favorite comfort food slowly.
Look through old photos of happy times.
Take a warm shower or bath.
Make a cup of herbal tea and sip slowly.
anxiety: Take slow breaths in through your nose and out through your mouth.
Focus on something you can see and describe it in detail.
Write down what is worrying you right now.
Drink some water and sit in a comfortable position.
Take a short break and relax your muscles.
Repeat a calming phrase such as 'I am safe right now'.
Focus on your breathing rhythm for one minute.
Rub your hands together and feel the warmth.
Name 5 things you can touch right now.
Hold an ice cube until it melts.
Trace your fingers on your arm slowly.
angry: Take 10 deep breaths while counting slowly.
Go for a brisk walk or do jumping jacks.
Squeeze a stress ball or pillow tightly.
Write down exactly what made you angry.
Listen to loud music and shake out your body.
Splash cold water on your face.
Punch a pillow while saying 'I'm releasing this anger'.
Draw angry scribbles on paper then tear it up.
Eat a piece of fruit mindfully.
List 3 things you're grateful for right now.
happy: Dance to your favorite upbeat song.
Call or text a friend to share your good mood.
Take a selfie and make a silly face.
Write down what made you happy today.
Do a happy dance or victory pose.
Share your good news on social media.
Treat yourself to a small reward.
Sing along to your favorite song loudly.
Make a gratitude list of 5 things.
Take a photo of something beautiful nearby.
general: Take a moment to relax and breathe slowly.
Step away from the screen and stretch your body.
Spend a few minutes in a quiet place.
Write down your thoughts to organize your feelings.
Reach out to someone you trust for support.
Drink water and eat a healthy snack.
Look outside at nature or the sky.
Do a quick body scan meditation.
Smile at yourself in the mirror.
